basic_details.job_title: IIT Gandhinagar Project Assistant I Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for IIT Gandhinagar Project Assistant I Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Project Assistant I position at IIT Gandhinagar is 26th May 2026. Ensure all details are accurate before the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Project Assistant I?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies for the Project Assistant I post announced by IIT Gandhinagar in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for Project Assistant I?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a B.C.A./B.Sc. or an equivalent qualification. Additionally, a minimum of 60% from graduation onwards and 55% in 10th and 12th grades are required.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Assistant I position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Project Assistant I role will receive a monthly salary ranging from Rs. 28,000 to Rs. 44,000.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for IIT Gandhinagar Project Assistant I jobs?
faq.answer: The application process for the IIT Gandhinagar Project Assistant I recruitment is strictly online. Candidates need to apply through the official website or the provided link.

faq.question: Q7. What is the job type for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The positions advertised are on a contract basis, meaning the employment will be for a fixed tenure as per the project requirements.

faq.question: Q8. Where is IIT Gandhinagar located?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Technology Gandhinagar is located in Gandhinagar, Gujarat.

faq.question: Q9. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is OTH/13470/Advt0181.

faq.question: Q10. Can candidates from outside Gujarat apply?
faq.answer: The notification mentions inviting applications from eligible candidates in Gujarat. However, it is advisable to check the detailed eligibility criteria in the official notification for any specific state-related requirements.
